name: Meri Zindagi Hai Tu
overview: Kamyar, a charming yet impulsive man, and Ayra, a principled girl with a pure heart. What begins as a sweet connection turns into a storm of emotions, deception, and longing, testing the strength of love and trust.

trailers.title: MERI ZINDAGI HAI TU | OFFICIAL TEASER 2 | HANIA AAMIR - BILAL ABBAS | TOP PAKISTANI DRAMA
